{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213154156CD714F2FD5AB4A775"}"},"total":2217},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6987010546935694110","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"张凌岱修仙之缘，道心无畏，修的是超脱天道打破禁锢，修仙修仙一途机缘看自身之造化，在强者为尊的世界，普通修士和凡人如同蝼蚁，看到为了重塑鬼身而屠杀十万凡人和邪灵入侵人缘界时，只觉得触目惊心不敢想象是何等惨烈……
张凌岱头脑清晰心思敏锐，重情重义不忘初心，不杀无辜之人，人若犯他者必杀之。
作者大大这本书写的非常好，虽然前面可能会有点无聊，不过看下去我相信你会喜欢的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626790165,"group_id":"6853029570157743111","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"问灵十三载，等一不归人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N57GFjZIySmsydyDcE8U0IMz8JSAjGkrmDRRY/48e62k","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0532fa07683647a58710c5c6db0834f4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616533&x-signature=pHMtUkIWX%2F%2Bok0wdtC8v5pumwjA%3D","user_id":"2629659941675511","user_name":"无羡已挂机"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2629659941675511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6853029570157743111","book_info":{"abstract":"【古典仙侠+扮猪吃虎+无系统+单女主】
从来美人与英雄，不许人间见白头。岁月最是无情不饶人，我辈修行亦不可饶了岁月。
修行之路，本就是夺天地造化，求大道机缘，得道成长生，逍遥天地间。
落云宗外门弟子张凌岱，在完成师门任务之时，偶得一阴阳玉葫。从此开启了属于他的长生之路，随着对玉葫的了解加深，张凌岱愈发感觉到玉葫的恐怖，随着修为增加，玉葫背后隐藏的秘密也逐步揭开……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/5e1919dccddb6b2ef926fa88b2c4aa2c","author":"谁泛涟漪","author_id":"","book_id":"6853029570157743111","book_name":"玉葫仙缘","book_short_name":"仙葫证道","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3851人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6853036108909904396","read_count":"3851","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1693528"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"796","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,扮猪吃虎,单女主,东方玄幻,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/1000300024c605fc18bc2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283914&x-signature=6PVZDucACoVSEhFYV2mJSC8twsI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"61615926509","extra":{"c
